com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier

Packages that use ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier 
Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal
Design guide
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension  

  • Uses of ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

    Subinterfaces of ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java 
    Modifier and Type Interface Description
    interface  FloatingPointVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of a floating-point number.
    interface  PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of a primitive floating-point number.

  • Uses of ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

    Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal that implement ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  DoubleVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of FloatingPointVerifier<Double>.
    class  FloatingPointVerifierNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    A FloatingPointVerifier that does nothing.
    class  FloatVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of FloatingPointVerifier<Float>.
    class  PrimitiveDoubleVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier for doubles.
    class  PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifierNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    A PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier that does nothing.
    class  PrimitiveFloatVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier for floats.

  • Uses of ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension

    Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension that implement ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  AbstractFloatingPointVerifier<S,​V extends ExtensibleFloatingPointValidator<V,​T>,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Default implementation of ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier.
    class  AbstractFloatingPointVerifierNoOp<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    An ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier that does nothing.
